title: diallosperma spinosa
intro: Diallosperma spinosa, also known as the yellow ironwood or African black ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a high concentration of tannins and has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Diallosperma spinosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, prevent infections, and promote overall well-being. The bark can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, or it can be dried and used as a powder in traditional medicine.
